programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: I Remember
programme.desc: The intense experience of a woman and her family as they come to terms with the early onset of Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: The Ninja Rebellion
programme.desc: In the ninth year of the Tensei era, Ninja clan Iga is attacked by a shogun and his ninja clan.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi Jung's mother frantically calls him threatening to commit suicide.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Hello, Goodbye
programme.desc: Aoi and Hazuka are classmates, but they are not friends. The two girls meet an elderly woman who wants to give a love letter to her first love. Hazuka and Aoi try to find her first love.

programme.title: Soul Stitcher
programme.desc: A granny comes looking for a cure for her granddaughter.

programme.title: Soul Stitcher
programme.desc: The clinic has a new rival and the owner appears to be in love with Ning Weiyu.

programme.title: Soul Stitcher
programme.desc: Su Wen hides her real personality behind a mask of beauty.

programme.title: Soul Stitcher
programme.desc: As the clinic grants Yuyan's dying wish, Cen Huan gets trapped in a bronze mirror.

programme.title: Ip Man 2: Legend of the Grandmaster
programme.desc: Wing Chun martial arts master Ip Man moves to Hong Kong to create a school where he can teach his fighting techniques to a new generation. Instead, he's drawn into a showdown with a merciless boxer known as the Twister.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: Martial-arts master Ip Man (Donnie Yen) takes on a crooked developer (Mike Tyson) and his gang of brutal thugs.

programme.title: Ip Man 4: The Finale
programme.desc: Ip Man and his son encounter racial discrimination after traveling to the United States to seek a better life.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: Defeated by Master Ip, martial arts expert Cheung Tin Chi tries to lead a normal life in Hong Kong until triad leaders draw him back into fighting.

programme.title: Rebel Without a Crew: The Robert Rodriguez Film School
programme.desc: Robert breaks down how he approaches low-budget screenwriting and teaches the audience how to start their own screenplays by using his notecard method.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno (Lorenzo Lamas) tries to help an ex-con race-car driver (John Beck) get free of his entanglement with a bank robber (Sam Jones). With Branscombe Richmond.

programme.title: Soldiers of Fortune
programme.desc: A former Special Forces soldier (Christian Slater) must protect a group of thrill-seeking millionaires who have paid big bucks to take part in a military excursion.

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two guys (Chuck Norris, Louis Gossett Jr.) and a girl (Melody Anderson) brave jungle hazards to find an Aztec temple filled with gold.

programme.title: Sharknado
programme.desc: A monstrous storm devastates Los Angeles, leaving the streets flooded and infested with sharks.

programme.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
programme.desc: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple.

programme.title: Duchess
programme.desc: Duchess, a small-time crook, tries to enter the treacherous underworld of diamond trafficking and ends up left for dead when a deal goes wrong. Determined to seek retribution she launches into an unwavering pursuit for vengeance.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: A discovery made by a kung fu obsessed American teen sends him on an adventure to China, where he joins up with a band of martial arts warriors in order to free the imprisoned Monkey King.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: A 13-year-old clairvoyant (Dakota Fanning) and the son (Chris Evans) of a murdered assassin join forces against a covert government agency that dabbles in psychic drugs and warfare.

programme.title: Born to Raise Hell
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent (Steven Seagal) and his team investigate weapon trafficking in Eastern Europe when they are caught in a street war between Gypsy gangs and Russians.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Hunter and collector Frank Walsh sails to America with a priceless white jaguar and a dangerous political assassin. When the prisoner manages to break free, Walsh must utilize his expert skills to capture the dangerous killer -- not dead, but alive.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: A hitman who's in Bangkok to pull off a series of jobs violates his personal code when he falls for a local woman and bonds with his errand boy.

programme.title: Beat Street
programme.desc: A student composer (Rae Dawn Chong) inspires South Bronx residents to new heights in break dancing, rap music and graffiti.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night: Give Me Your Life
programme.desc: As Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) and Harriet prepare to leave for their honeymoon, Forbes (Carl Weathers) clashes with a charismatic cult leader (Peter Fonda) who has arrived in Sparta.

programme.title: Seventeen Again
programme.desc: While divorced and bickering grandparents watch their grandchildren (Tia Mowry, Tamera Mowry), a lab experiment gone awry transforms the elders into teenagers again.

programme.title: The Cookout
programme.desc: After her son signs a contract with an NBA team, a woman invites friends and family to a wild barbecue at his new mansion.

programme.title: Uncle P
programme.desc: A hip-hop superstar (Percy Miller) has his hands full while watching his sister's three children in the suburbs.

programme.title: Running Scared
programme.desc: Two cool Chicago undercover officers (Gregory Hines, Billy Crystal) try to put a drug lord (Jimmy Smits) permanently out of business.

programme.title: Rappin'
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Mario Van Peebles) shows residents of his Pittsburgh ghetto how to drive out riffraff with rap music.

programme.title: Good Fences
programme.desc: A black attorney (Danny Glover), his wife (Whoopi Goldberg) and their two children move to a posh neighborhood in Greenwich, Conn.

programme.title: Marshall
programme.desc: Young Thurgood Marshall faces one of his greatest challenges while working as a lawyer for the NAACP. He teams up with lawyer Sam Friedman to defend Joseph Spell, a Black chauffeur whose employer accuses him of sexual assault and attempted murder.

programme.title: Lee Daniels' The Butler
programme.desc: A White House butler (Forest Whitaker) has a front-row seat to history through three decades and seven presidential administrations, including those of Eisenhower (Robin Williams), Kennedy (James Marsden) and Nixon (John Cusack).

programme.title: Youngblood
programme.desc: An angry Vietnam veteran (Lawrence-Hilton Jacobs) leads a Los Angeles street gang in a war on drug dealers.

programme.title: The Wash
programme.desc: Two roommates (Dr. Dre, Snoop "Doggy" Dogg) who work at a car wash must save their kidnapped boss (George Wallace) in order to keep their jobs.

programme.title: Meet the Blacks
programme.desc: A Chicago man (Mike Epps) moves his family to Beverly Hills, Calif., on the same day when all crime becomes legal for a 12-hour period.

programme.title: Ringmaster
programme.desc: People (Jaime Pressly, Molly Hagan) having sordid affairs appear with their loved ones on a talk-show host's (Jerry Springer) popular, controversial TV program.

programme.title: Dear White People
programme.desc: A campus culture war between blacks and whites at a predominantly white school comes to a head when the staff of a humor magazine stages an offensive Halloween party.

programme.title: Rappin'
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Mario Van Peebles) shows residents of his Pittsburgh ghetto how to drive out riffraff with rap music.

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee
programme.desc: Akeelah, an 11-year-old girl living in South Los Angeles, discovers she has a talent for spelling, which she hopes will take her to the National Spelling Bee.

programme.title: Dear White People
programme.desc: A campus culture war between blacks and whites at a predominantly white school comes to a head when the staff of a humor magazine stages an offensive Halloween party.

programme.title: Cut Throat City
programme.desc: When Hurricane Katrina devastates New Orleans, four desperate friends band together to pull off a daring heist in the heart of the city.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: When his brother is killed, LAPD officer Mark leaves the city to return to the island he grew up on. Seeking answers and vengeance, he soon finds himself in a bloody battle with the corrupt tycoon who's taken over the island paradise.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: A former Marine (Michael Jai White) travels to Brazil to hunt down the brutal Japanese mobsters who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Separation
programme.desc: Married New Yorkers (Stockard Channing, Donald Sutherland) question the motives of an overnight guest (Will Smith) who pretends to be someone else.

programme.title: Mama Flora's Family
programme.desc: A black matriarch instills values of God and family in three generations of 20th-century kin. Adapted from a book by Alex Haley and David Stevens.

programme.title: A Woman Called Moses
programme.desc: Tubman is a slave whose new owner claims to be a fair man, but treats her harshly; she finds inspiration to escape for freedom in the North.

programme.title: A Woman Called Moses
programme.desc: At the risk of recapture, Harriet Tubman helps organize the Underground Railroad, which enables hundreds of enslaved African Americans to make their way to the freedom of the North.

programme.title: Homer & Eddie
programme.desc: A slow-witted dishwasher (James Belushi) drives to Oregon with a dying woman (Whoopi Goldberg) who robs stores and shoots people.

programme.title: Running Scared
programme.desc: Two cool Chicago undercover officers (Gregory Hines, Billy Crystal) try to put a drug lord (Jimmy Smits) permanently out of business.

programme.title: Livin' for Love: The Natalie Cole Story
programme.desc: The singer/songwriter (Natalie Cole), daughter of musician Nat "King" Cole, finds life in the public eye to be overwhelming.

programme.title: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Mike tries to get out of the drug trade to save his little sister, Angel, and leaves her with John (Cuba Gooding Jr.), an undercover cop. Mike is killed, and the drug lords kidnap Angel, forcing John to use all of his skills to save the innocent girl.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Brooklyn
programme.desc: Newly released from prison, a man (William DeMeo) scoffs at the chance to earn an honest living in his father's construction business; instead he returns to a life of crime.

programme.title: Number One With a Bullet
programme.desc: A suave Los Angeles detective (Billy Dee Williams) and his quirky partner (Robert Carradine) hunt a drug lord who has social clout.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Aurora le anuncia al padre Francisco que está dispuesta a entregarse a Diego. Francois y Rodrigo comienzan sus coqueteos. Rodrigo mete a Jessica en la nómina. Damely e Irene comienzan a sospechar sobre el cambio de actitud de Diego.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Aurora sospecha de las actitudes peculiares de Diego y, al parecer, no podrán consumar la pasión. Francois piensa cambiar a Alberto por un mejor prospecto. Rodrigo se sorprende al ver a Martín e Irene juntos y llegan a los golpes.

programme.title: La mujer de Judas
programme.desc: Una periodista apasionada de las leyendas mexicanas va hacia Xico, Veracruz a investigar sobre la muerte del padre Sebastián que fue encontrado muerto en brazos de una mujer llamada Altagracia del Toro y muchos misterios sin resolver saldrán a luz.

programme.title: La mujer de Judas
programme.desc: Una periodista apasionada de las leyendas mexicanas va hacia Xico, Veracruz a investigar sobre la muerte del padre Sebastián que fue encontrado muerto en brazos de una mujer llamada Altagracia del Toro y muchos misterios sin resolver saldrán a luz.

programme.title: María de los Ángeles
programme.desc: Una joven debe enfrentar a su tía para reclamar sus derechos y fortuna y vive situaciones difíciles.

programme.title: María de los Ángeles
programme.desc: María llora desconsolada mientras Marino asegura que Jorge está muerto.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Orestes busca a Bella, pero ella no soporta tener que ocultar sus sentimientos y lo evade. Por otro lado, Olimpia pasa tiempo en la cárcel y espera el momento de su salida para vengarse.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Chiqui interroga a Orestes porque quiere saber si Franklin tiene razón al sospechar que él es el Lirio de Plata. Chiqui jura atentar contra su vida si Orestes la abandona. En contra de su voluntad, Olimpia debe soportar las órdenes de Bella.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Oréstes confiesa que con los besos de Bella logró olvidar a Valentina. Muñeca le exige a Lorenzo que se vaya. Oréstes enfrenta a Olimpia y le pide que no insulte más a Bella.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Chiquinquirá se confiesa con Franklin. Bella está convencida de que Oréstes es prohibido. Franklin y Chiqui despiertan abrazados y ella reconoce que le gusta. Olimpia se descontrola al enterarse de que Orestes vió a Josema. Olimpia quiere venganza.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.sub-title: Por las buenas o por las malas
programme.desc: Román secuestra a Bella. Tza Tzá quiere que el Lirio de Plata rescate a Bella.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Orestes está seguro del amor que siente por Bella y, para demostrárselo, le exigirá el divorcio a Chiqui. Román está preso y piensa la manera de acabar con el Lirio de Plata para quedarse con Bella. Olimpia planea tomar las riendas una vez más.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Juana, que busca a su tío, se tropieza con David. Éste, furioso, le advierte que hay algo que debe explicarle. Sol lo mira desconcertada al no saber de qué se trata.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Sol le asegura a Mauricio que aunque esté embarazada, no ha tenido relaciones con ningún hombre. Mauricio es la única persona que no se escandaliza al saber que es virgen y espera un hijo.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Alfredo se comunica con su hermana la noticia del embarazo de la fotógrafa salió en primera plana. Carlota se impacta al saber que no sólo Juana está embarazada, sino que, proclama ser virgen.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Juana, orgullosa, le revela a Lili que su jefe, a pesar de que sabe lo de su embarazo, insiste en ayudarla.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: El padre José aclara a Mauricio que Juana nunca estuvo de acuerdo en dar en adopción al bebé, todo se trató de una conjetura de su parte al creer que la joven podría abortar.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Una vez en su hogar, Mauricio es interceptado por Desireé, quien parece decidida a revelarle sus verdaderos sentimientos hacia él, quien la mira desconcertado.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Julia y Ezequiel se enfrentan y ella le revela la verdad sobre su boda secreta. Astrid y Max van con el médico y les dice que deben esperar uno o dos años. Celso amenaza a Julia. Elda y Patricia hablan sobre Alfredo. Sebastián defiende a Julia.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Celso amenaza con una pistola a Gregorio y le da un ultimátum. Octavia le reclama a Ezequiel el haber apoyado a Celso. Julia le cuenta a Gregorio que Celso la intentó violar y actúa con ira. Axel comienza a dudar de su fertilidad.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Leandro le da una paliza a Fernando y le advierte que no se acerque al bebé. Fausto descubre que Gregorio se casó con Julia. Yeli y Leandro aclaran su situación. La Chila sufre porque Moi la dejó. Julia es apuñalada.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Camila le avisa a Fausto que Patricia le pone los cuernos con Celso. Fausto descubre a Patricia con Celso, mientras Camila graba la situación. Camila le aconseja a Patricia que escape. Julia se recupera de la puñalada.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia se encuentra acorralada y le cuenta a Amelia de Celso. Camila planea hacerle a Patricia lo mismo que le hizo a su madre. Axel llama a un médico, descubre su esterilidad y rompe en llanto. Se decide que Patricia vaya a la cárcel.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia le dice a Camila que Fausto mató a Celso y quiere culparla de todo a ella. A Sebastián no le importa el nacimiento del hijo de Amelia. Los policías tienen de testigo a Fausto para resolver el caso de la muerte de Celso.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Diego le reclama a Martín la relación que tiene con Irene. Celeste le recrimina a Eleazar que haya llevado a sus hijos a un burdel. Micaela, en plena consulta, queda en ropa interior con Martín e Irene entra al consultorio atestiguando todo.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Rodrigo, con sus poderes, orilla a que Diego caiga y se golpee en la cabeza. Martín le reclama a Karín la calumnia que inventó. Jessica queda impávida al ver el odio que Rodrigo le profesa a Diego. Aurora se angustia por el estado de Diego.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Con la ayuda de Jessica, Rodrigo se hace pasar por Diego, que sigue en coma, usurpando así su identidad y haciéndose pasar por su gemelo. Aurora estalla en felicidad al saber que Diego despertó. Rodrigo comienza su maquiavélico plan.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Rodrigo quiere intimar con Aurora, pero ella se niega y éste le da un ultimátum. Alberto, finalmente, tiene un buen desempeño en la cama. El idilio entre Martín e Irene va viento en popa y él le propone matrimonio a su amada.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Aurora le anuncia al padre Francisco que está dispuesta a entregarse a Diego. Francois y Rodrigo comienzan sus coqueteos. Rodrigo mete a Jessica en la nómina. Damely e Irene comienzan a sospechar sobre el cambio de actitud de Diego.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares the ultimate shore lunch of fried walleye filets, served with a tangy homemade tartar sauce, coleslaw, and crispy fried potatoes. Next, chef grills bone-in elk chops with a simple mustard glaze over hardwood charcoal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Boar Ribs and Shrimp and Grits
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern makes a homemade barbecue rub, basting sauce and barbecue sauce for wild boar ribs. Next, chef shares his twist on a classic southern shrimp and grits recipe, adding a side of beautiful wild mushrooms.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Beef Shank is the New Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking a humungous Thor's Hammer; cooking up some Catfish & Eggs for breakfast; making a Grilled Salsa Verde; and putting on a pot of Mezcal Charro Beans.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Secret to World-Class Texas Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are making brisket 3 ways! They're pit-smoking a classic Texas brisket; showing you how to gussy up a pot of Brisket Baked Beans; and making a charcoal-grilled Vietnamese Brisket Noodle Bowl with all the fixings.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Why LA's Danger Dog is the Best Thing You'll Ever Eat
programme.desc: Kevin & Noah make their twists on some L.A. outdoor classics: Backyard Burgers 2 Ways; Pit-Smoked Pollo Asado; Grilled Mexican Street Corn and Bacon-Wrapped Danger Dogs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: These Smoked Turkey Legs are better than the State Fair
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah smoke up some State Fair Turkey Legs; fry some skillet Chorizo & Eggs; smoke-and-fry some Buffalo Rib Tips; and cook up some Sriracha and Garlic-Butter Grilled Shrimp.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Only Pulled Pork Recipe You'll Ever Need
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking up some BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwiches with Coleslaw; frying up a skillet of Creole Cabbage; and charcoal-grilling some Steak Sandwiches with Chimichurri Mayo.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern goes primal with two antelope dishes: a Greek-style whole leg roasted over the open fire with a lemony avgolemono sauce and crispy potatoes, and a simple antelope tenderloin carpaccio served with roasted tomatoes and parmesan.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Chicken Fried Deer and Creole Halibut
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares chicken fried axis deer. Next, Chef Zimmern poaches halibut in tomato roux.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Eggplant Caponata Toast and Crispy Squab Katsu
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern creates an elegant, seared pigeon toast crowned with a Sicilian caponata bursting with grilled eggplant, olives, and capers and a crispy pigeon katsu served with a refreshing shaved cabbage salad and punchy ginger-carrot vinaigrette.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern showcases quail two ways: classic Southern fried quail with lemon-basil aioli, and as an elevated topping for a traditional open-fire paella, complete with crispy socarrat. He proves this small bird makes an extraordinary dinner.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Nashville Hot Pheasant and Mint Basil Lemonade
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern takes a spin on Nashville-style hot fried chicken. Hot and spicy, batter coated, crispy fried pheasant is paired with a spinach salad topped with bacon vinaigrette and ice cold mint basil lemonade.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Eggplant: A fruit you didn't know was a fruit. Often underrated and overlooked, Frankie shows us how to shop for and cook this filling, delicious, cost-effective, and versatile ingredient. Master these cooking techniques.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.sub-title: Meat: More Bang for Your Buck
programme.desc: Frankie shows which cuts of meat provide the most bang for a consumer's buck, and equally as important, how to cook them for optimal flavor.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie busts the myth that eating plant-based is expensive. Preparing these good-for-you meals is all about eating seasonally to save money on produce, and shopping the bulk aisle for even more savings on plant-based pantry items.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie figured out the weekly budget grocery equation so you don't have to. Breakfast, lunch, and dinner for seven days, for a family of four, for under $150. All it takes is a little planning, meal prep, and using up leftovers in inventive ways.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Cheese can be really expensive. Frankie teaches us how to cook with more affordable cheese swaps than what might normally be called for in a recipe. More importantly, we learn how to stretch cheese in a dish so it can be the star.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Tomatoes are one of the most produced fruits, especially when in season. Frankie teaches us how to prepare them fresh in a variety of ways. And for even more savings, Frankie will share a few tips on how to preserve tomatoes.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Date night doesn't have to be at an over-priced, mediocre restaurant. Frankie prepares an affordable and delicious sushi date night at home, filled with three courses, plus tips on how to set date night ambiance at home on a struggle budget.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: A big way to save money on a struggle budget is to prepare homemade lunches for work. Frankie shows us how to make five delicious lunches for the whole work week. Each one flavored differently during meal prep so you don't get bored.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Flour has the super power to transform into an endless variety of meals, and a little goes a long way. Frankie teaches us how to make three different meals using flour as the affordable vehicle. Save money, learn new techniques.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: You say hotdishes, Frankie says casserole. Either way, these one-pot hotdishes are an affordable way to feed a group of people, or the family for dinner. Plus they're great to freeze for future meals.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Cancel the pizza delivery, it's time to save money and build your pies from scratch. With three different pizza styles, you're bound to find one that satisfies your craving without digging into your wallet.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Join Frankie to learn the ins and outs of using every part of a chicken, as he demonstrates how to maximize the value and minimize waste. By cooking smarter, you'll have three delectable recipes to last you the whole week.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Everyone knows Frankie can't live without pasta, but this week he shares his favorite Italian recipes that don't require any kneading. Add these simple, delicious dishes to your weeknight menu to complete your Italian dish repertoire.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: At a loss when your pantry is empty? With these recipes, you can walk into any grocery store with only $7 and walk out with everything you need for an entire meal. Because yes, you can whip up a nutritious meal at an affordable price!

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Send your taste buds on a first class food tour without even leaving the Struggle kitchen! Frankie whips up his favorite regional specialties from five destinations, making them as authentic as possible while sticking to his budget.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: It's dinnertime and breakfast is on the menu this week. These affordable breakfast specials are hearty enough for dinner, and so delicious they may even taste better after dark. Grab a fork and dig in for the most important meal of the day!

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Any true struggle cook knows there's nothing better than a one pot dinner. Not only is there hardly any cleanup at the end, but the prep is minimal too, which means hunger satisfaction is imminent. Who says meals can't be cheap, easy and delicious?

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Last minute company leaving you in a pinch? Frankie has you covered with these easy recipes featuring store bought staples. With a few Struggle tips, these basic ingredients can be transformed into dishes that will impress your guests.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Going green isn't just a trend; it's a no-brainer! When the veggies are in season and the prices are at their lowest, Frankie's colorful recipes and zero waste tips will have you celebrating the savings with fresh spring produce.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Is it a burger? Is it a sandwich? Is a burger a sandwich? Not even Frankie knows the answer, but one thing is certain: whatever you want to call them, these fun twists and familiar flavor combos are super satisfying to scarf down.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Hickory Smoked Virginia Ham & Mint Juleps
programme.desc: Pat Martin gets a history lesson on the origin of American barbecue from "The Professor" Tuffy Stone.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Roscoe Family Legacy: Alabama Pit Ribs
programme.desc: Pat heads to Birmingham to team up with artist and chef Roscoe Hall, cooking ribs inspired by Roscoe's family legacy.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin teams up with fellow pitmasters to showcase the rugged and nuanced tradition of whole-hog cooking, West Tennessee-style.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Gainesboro, Tennessee to visit a free-range hog farm, learn about their operations, and grill up a less desired, but no less delicious, cut of hog - pork steaks.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Legend of Louis Mueller's Dino Beef Ribs
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Secret to Texas-Style Smoked Brisket
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Pit-Cooked Chicken with Alabama White Sauce
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Decatur, Alabama to visit a storied institution of barbecue - Big Bob Gibson's. There, he learns the ins, the outs, and the history of a regional delicacy: pit-cooked chicken with Alabama white sauce.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Catching Gulf Coast Redfish and Blue Crabs
programme.desc: Pat visits Houston to go Gulf Bay fishing with chef Chris Shepherd, hoping to catch some redfish and gather a side of blue crabs.

programme.sub-title: Discovering Indian Lamb Kebabs in Nashville
programme.desc: Pat grills riverside with renowned chef Vivek Surti, crafting lamb mamna and chicken kebabs inspired by his Indian heritage.

programme.desc: It's dinnertime and breakfast is on the menu this week. These affordable breakfast specials are hearty enough for dinner, and so delicious they may even taste better after dark. Grab a fork and dig in for the most important meal of the day!

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Any true struggle cook knows there's nothing better than a one pot dinner. Not only is there hardly any cleanup at the end, but the prep is minimal too, which means hunger satisfaction is imminent. Who says meals can't be cheap, easy and delicious?

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Last minute company leaving you in a pinch? Frankie has you covered with these easy recipes featuring store bought staples. With a few Struggle tips, these basic ingredients can be transformed into dishes that will impress your guests.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Going green isn't just a trend; it's a no-brainer! When the veggies are in season and the prices are at their lowest, Frankie's colorful recipes and zero waste tips will have you celebrating the savings with fresh spring produce.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Is it a burger? Is it a sandwich? Is a burger a sandwich? Not even Frankie knows the answer, but one thing is certain: whatever you want to call them, these fun twists and familiar flavor combos are super satisfying to scarf down.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde channels his inner sandwich lover by making an angry lobster club with pepper aioli and grilled bacon, a lamb birria torta with avocado and ramen consomme, and his an Italian beef combo with chili crisp cheese sauce, and giardiniera.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde shows us how he does Sunday up right as he grills up some Vietnamese Brisket with Rice Noodles, Crispy Swordfish Summer Rolls, and tops it all off with some tasty Soju Floats. Hey, it's Sunday somewhere, right?

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale crafts a family style platter of trumpet mushrooms, eggplant marinated in spicy ssam jang, and charred yellow squash served with a green goddess dressing.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde brings your basic burgers to a new level with his dry-aged beef burger with potatoes and truffle dijon mayo, a part-beef part-pork belly burger with cheddar & an egg, and lastly a crispy mushroom tortilla burger with salsa & cheese.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde brings the heat when it comes to making perfect pork dishes including a root beer glazed pork banh mi, chorizo fried rice, Filipino sausage stuffed long hot peppers, and round it all out with a spicy grilled pineapple sundae.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: Wok Cooking On A Charcoal Grill
programme.desc: Anything is possible with a wok and a good ol' charcoal grill, at least if you're Chef Dale, who throws together a heavenly spread of fiery eats, from drunken meats, stir fried veggies, and stir fried noodles.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Ribs are a lifestyle, and Chef Dale's living it up with smoky beef shorties in tangy red wine glaze, Miami-style pork ribs dripping in bacon-guava BBQ, spicy baked beans, and killer key lime caramel cones. Grab some napkins!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: A Festive & Flavorful Christmas in July
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde grills smoked ham and pineapple praline sliders, sweet potatoes with soy maple bacon, eggplant with labneh and cranberries, a holiday mezze plate and a grilled coquito cocktail.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde pulls out all the stops for this daddy-sized dinner. He grills up prime rib with herb & horseradish crust, lobster & chili sauce American, charred green beans with garlic tahini, and cheddar-stuffed parker house rolls.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: It's always taco night at Chef Dale's house! He turns up the heat with grilled salmon tacos with salsa verde & cauliflower escabeche, duck al pastor tacos with habanero pineapple salsa, & a smokey mushroom queso taco with truffle mole negro.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.desc: Frankie visits Nashville for smoky BBQ Pork, hand-pulled noodles, a luxe burger, and hand-pulled noodles.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Chiles, Burgers, & Tenderloins in Santa Fe
programme.desc: Frankie heads to Santa Fe investigating New Mexican cuisines eating green chili burgers, poblano chile stews, and sweet blue-corn pancakes.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Squid Salad and Crispy Squid on the Plancha
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern creates a vibrant salad where grilled squid is served with shaved fennel, cherry tomatoes, endive, and a lemon dressing. Then, Andrew shares his country-style squid on the plancha with fresh breadcrumbs, chilies, and a homemade aioli.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Poultry Perfection: Moroccan Spiced Guinea Hen with Charred Vegetables
programme.desc: Andrew unlocks the rich flavor of guinea hen with a vibrant grilled salad featuring watercress and a mustard-hazelnut vinaigrette. Then, he slow-roasts a whole bird with Middle Eastern spices, served with harissa squash and eggplant-tahini purée.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Venison Paillard and Hearty Hunter's Stew
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern showcases venison two ways: a delicate grilled paillard with artichokes and parmesan, and a rich, slow-braised Polish hunter's stew with kielbasa, mushrooms, and sauerkraut. Served with grilled leeks and coal-roasted potatoes.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Mediterranean Grilled Filets and Salt Crusted Halibut
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern elevates California halibut, first with grilled fillets on saffron labneh with romesco and roasted cabbage. Then, he demonstrates a classic salt-crusted whole halibut, served with whole roasted cauliflower and a rich cream sauce.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern showcases quail two ways: classic Southern fried quail with lemon-basil aioli, and as an elevated topping for a traditional open-fire paella, complete with crispy socarrat. He proves this small bird makes an extraordinary dinner.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Minnesota's forests for wild mushrooms. He creates a simple grilled mushroom salad, then hand-shapes cavatelli pasta tossed with golden chanterelles, butter, garlic, thyme, and colatura. He shares foraging and cleaning tips.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Clams Casino and Garlicky Clam Pizza
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern celebrates cherrystone clams with two show-stopping recipes. He prepares classic grilled clams casino with pancetta, then pushes boundaries with an innovative grilled pizza topped with clams, garlic, chiles, and cheese.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Elk Tenderloin Tostadas and Grilled Rack of Ribs
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights lean elk, first crafting classic Mexican tostadas with grilled tenderloin, avocado, and homemade salsa macha. Then, he grills a whole rack of elk, serving it with creamy colcannon, tarragon emulsion, and rosemary charcoal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Southern Shrimp Skewers and Asian Crispy Rice
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern grills beloved shrimp in two distinct ways. He starts with jumbo shrimp and country ham skewers glazed with sweet-hot pepper jelly. Then, he creates Asian-inspired shrimp, served over crispy battle rice and a complex sambal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Wild Boar Feast: Chorizo with Mussels and Whole Roasted Leg
programme.desc: Wild boar takes center stage! Andrew makes chorizo with mussels, preserved lemon & white wine. Then, he slow-roasts a whole leg over fire, served Southern-style with pickled cherries, glazed onions & mustard sauce.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern makes two different dishes with red snapper: fried snapper fingers with a spicy chile-orange mayonnaise dipping sauce and a slow-roasted whole fish with an herb salad and charred miso sweet potatoes.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern goes primal with two antelope dishes: a Greek-style whole leg roasted over the open fire with a lemony avgolemono sauce and crispy potatoes, and a simple antelope tenderloin carpaccio served with roasted tomatoes and parmesan.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Crispy Pork Noodles and Cheesy Chard Cannelloni
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates rhubarb in a lip-smacking sauce, heroes spinach in a silky goat's cheese risotto and marries vibrant basil with chard in a crowd-pleasing cheesy spring cannelloni.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Spring Onion Chicken Curry and Sausage Broccoli Pizza
programme.desc: Jamie elevates asparagus spears for a fishy feat, makes spring onions the star of the show in his spicy green chicken curry and gives purple sprouting broccoli an Italian-inspired makeover.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Stuffed Salmon Celebration and Almond Custard Tart
programme.desc: Jamie snazzes up some spuds with wild garlic pesto, creates a broad bean mezze, rustles up a beautiful spring salad and honours rhubarb in a luscious custard tart with almond brittle.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Whole Hog BBQ with Pitmaster Pat Martin
programme.desc: Jess teams up with legendary West Tennessee pitmaster and whole hog expert Pat Martin to cook a hog overnight and enjoy a special cut of beef from Australia.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: In windy Canyon, Texas, Jess visits West Texas A&M, where she interacts with a cloned cow, participates in a blind meat tasting experiment, and helps teach us how to break down a carcass into the cuts we see in the grocery store.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess visits Northstar Bison to learn about the small family-run ranch's breeding and processing operation, then prepares her signature smash burger.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Wyatt Ranches in South Texas to check out the cattle ranching operation they've been running since 1965.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Oklahoma, where she takes aim at one of the state's estimated 1.5 million feral hogs. Then, she makes a wild hog sausage roll with jalapeno and cheddar.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess loves country hams and there's no better place to visit than Benton's--a family-run business that's been perfecting curing and aging techniques for over 50 years.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess joins her friend Javi in his backyard, where he welds custom cooking contraptions, including an asado cross they use to cook cabrito together.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Smoked Elk Sandwiches at Juniper Mountain Ranch
programme.desc: Jess and her friend Shaundi Campbell meet up with guides from Juniper Mountain Ranch in southeastern Idaho to cull an elk for her smoked elk sandwiches.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Alpine Lamb Ribs from Siddoway Sheep Company
programme.desc: Jess joins the lamb-raising Siddoway family as they begin sorting the animals that are ready for processing. She then returns to the lodge, where she demonstrates how to prepare and grill lamb ribs.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess embarks on a road trip across Wisconsin with her good friend Kaitlin, stopping for a cannibal sandwich and a famous sausage from Usinger's in Milwaukee.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess visits the East Foundation in South Texas to participate in a fast-paced, yet careful and methodical deer capture.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Live Fire Venison Backstrap in Oklahoma
programme.desc: With the help of a local Oklahoma guide, Jess sets out to hunt an axis deer, then shares butchery techniques and prepares a delicious backstrap grilled over live fire.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess and her good friends, Fort Worth pitmaster Joe Riscky and Chef Juan Rodriguez, prepare a traditional barbacoa feast.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess joins her friend Matt Hughes, who helps run an adult learn-to-hunt program, and the two head out to hunt a wild hog in the senderos of South Texas.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: At Devil's Hole Ranch, Jess learns to drive cattle and uses the farm's organic garlic to create a delicious meal featuring steak grilled over hot coals.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Only Pulled Pork Recipe You'll Ever Need
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking up some BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwiches with Coleslaw; frying up a skillet of Creole Cabbage; and charcoal-grilling some Steak Sandwiches with Chimichurri Mayo.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Why LA's Danger Dog is the Best Thing You'll Ever Eat
programme.desc: Kevin & Noah make their twists on some L.A. outdoor classics: Backyard Burgers 2 Ways; Pit-Smoked Pollo Asado; Grilled Mexican Street Corn and Bacon-Wrapped Danger Dogs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Beef Shank is the New Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking a humungous Thor's Hammer; cooking up some Catfish & Eggs for breakfast; making a Grilled Salsa Verde; and putting on a pot of Mezcal Charro Beans.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Secret to World-Class Texas Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are making brisket 3 ways! They're pit-smoking a classic Texas brisket; showing you how to gussy up a pot of Brisket Baked Beans; and making a charcoal-grilled Vietnamese Brisket Noodle Bowl with all the fixings.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: These Smoked Turkey Legs are better than the State Fair
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah smoke up some State Fair Turkey Legs; fry some skillet Chorizo & Eggs; smoke-and-fry some Buffalo Rib Tips; and cook up some Sriracha and Garlic-Butter Grilled Shrimp.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat meets the trio behind Blood Bros BBQ to discover how three childhood friends seamlessly blended their Asian-American culture with the Texas barbecue traditions they grew up with.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat travels to the Emerald Coast of Destin, Florida, to join his friend Adam Evans on a spearfishing adventure, sourcing fresh fish to cook over live fire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Edgar Victoria, known for bringing the street foods of Mexico City to Nashville, to do some live fire cooking out in nature as they prepare one of his favorite dishes - skirt steak tlayuda.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin heads to the Cherokee National Forest for a day of fly fishing with an old friend, and to cook up their fresh catch over the campfire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat fishes the coastal inlets of Charleston, South Carolina, in search of a delicious sheepshead, which he plans to grill with his friend and chef James London.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire

programme.desc: Pat Martin gets a history lesson on the origin of American barbecue from "The Professor" Tuffy Stone.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin teams up with fellow pitmasters to showcase the rugged and nuanced tradition of whole-hog cooking, West Tennessee-style.

programme.desc: Pat heads to Birmingham to team up with artist and chef Roscoe Hall, cooking ribs inspired by Roscoe's family legacy.

programme.desc: Frankie goes to Miami to sample serious cherry smoked beef rib, three cheese spinach empanadas, and a legendary Cubano sandwich with homemade mustard.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Jamie Feilden's 60-acre farm doubles as a charity for urban youth. To fund it, he now plans two prefabricated elliptical cabins on a remote slope. They'll feature timber decks, open-plan living, and green roofs—though weather may delay the build.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Finally mortgage-free, Denise is now ready for her main floor to go from bleak to chic.Nicole and Caffery will create a maximalist, welcoming space that reflects her larger than lifepersonality!

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffery design a basement getaway for Sharon, Jason and theirgrowing tweens, creating a space where they'll actually want to hang out. They'llalso help real estate pro Haaris get his bungalow listing polished up in acompetitive market.

programme.title: Styled
programme.sub-title: Old Plan to Open Floor Plan
programme.desc: Sarah and Mark's house needs to be brought into the 21st century so Nicole and Cafferywill create a new, timeless and functional design for their family; real estate pro Karinaneeds help morphing a virtually staged listing into a real showstopper.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Sisters Leandra and Alayna's recently inherited their childhood home. So they've askedNicole and Caffery to transform it into a fresh, contemporary space while still honoring thepast.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffery transform a townhouse into an absolute dream for Nicole and her two daughters, while helping real estate pro Chris uncover and stage this cluttered suburban listing.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Tina and her husband Patrick have a home that is overrun with both baking supplies and soccer equipment. To extend this family's living space, Brian and Sarah turn their backyard into one part cake decorating studio and one part soccer field.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Kirsten works from the home office, while Joel is a sales representative with a make-shift workspace in their bedroom. To help this couple, Brian and Sarah look to the backyard for space to retrofit an old shipping container into an office.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Ali and Hana have two very talented young children - and a very noisy and crowded house. To give everyone in this family their own space, Brian and Sarah turn an old garage into a kids' music and arts hangout.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Debbie, Kevin, and their three children are a newly-blended family. To bring this new family together, Brian and Sarah build an irresistible treehouse village in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Craig and Claudia share their new space with Craig's brother, Craig's parents - and their two massive dogs. To give these new homeowners a place of their own, Brian and Sarah build a sports bar and entertainment hangout in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Miriam and Mark are busy parents to four kids under 10 years old. To help these hardworking parents unwind, Brian and Sarah build them a parents-only hideaway in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Jon, Trish, and their two children live in a quintessential family-friendly neighborhood. To give the whole community an outdoor space to enjoy, Brian and Sarah build an outdoor movie theatre in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Steve and Tanya are Realtors who just bought their forever home a few doors down from Tanya's parents. To complete their dream home, Brian and Sarah build a dream cottage retreat in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Medical doctors and busy parents, Cynthia and Boon miss their camping adventures. Brian and Sarah perform some backyard surgery, and build them a cozy campground retreat so they can go straight from the ER to getting some R&R right in their own yard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Janet's love for her nine grandkids is endless. But so is the chaos they bring inside her home when they come visit. To take that energy outside, Brian and Sarah build a fun kid-zone in the backyard, but also a sophisticated adult area for Janet.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Paris lovers, Louise and Rick, want to share their European enthusiasm with their two daughters without racking up the mileage. Brian and Sarah build them a French-inspired urban escape. It's Paris in their backyard! C'est magnifique!

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Ex-city slickers, Lauren and Mark, miss their friends and family from the city. Brian and Sarah create a country retreat with an outdoor pad, indoor dining lounge, and a chicken coop. When Lauren and Mark's friends visit, they'll never want to leave.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Mom and son duo, Paul and Catharine, are overwhelmed by Paul's multi-level backyard. Paul also finds his current indoor fitness regime frustrating. Brian and Sarah muscle up to the challenge by building a gym in his backyard, alongside a hot tub.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Dave and Jorge love art and entertaining, but with tenants in their basement and no creative space inside, Brian and Sarah turn their backyard into a creative party lounge and build a shipping container-inspired structure for an industrial feel.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Since having two kids, Sonia and Peter have resorted to staycations at home, but their backyard is a headache. Brian and Sarah create a luxury vacation destination that includes a pool, spa, outdoor kitchen and a stunning four-season structure.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Cool parents, Michelle and Adrian, are passionate about music and events. Brian and Sarah tune into their needs and amp up their boring backyard with a DJ den, a creative arts-and-crafts wall, and hang-out zones for family jam sessions.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Bachelor Kyle's father Jack has helped him renovate his new home, but the backyard is still unusable. To help Kyle throw the ultimate housewarming party, Brian and Sarah build a sexy sports pub, a lounge area and a firepit.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sham, Ruban and their twin boys aren't using their big, boring backyard. To help this family embrace the great outdoors, Brian and Sarah build a vacation style getaway, with a beach volleyball court and a kid's clubhouse.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Becki, Shawn and their 3 kids just moved from the city to a smaller country home. To extend their living space, Brian and Sarah build a new deck, a fire pit area, and a 3-season living space, in their first ever barn rehab.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Tammy and Sam are so busy, their backyard has fallen into disrepair and their 2 kids never use it. Brian and Sarah bring this yard back to life, and then some, with a new dining and lounge area and a fully functional pool house.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Andrea and David are foodies, but hosting in their "builder basic" yard is no fun. Brian and Sarah make their farm-to-table dreams come true, with a veggie garden, dining room, BBQ zone, and a play space for their 2 kids.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Nicole and Charles have 3 kids, and their neighborhood parties are getting too big for their front porch. So Brian and Sarah add more entertaining space in the backyard, plus a 4-season garage conversion with a nautical theme.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Melissa and Lee's 3 boys need more room for sports, and Mom needs more peace and quiet! So Brian and Sarah turn the underused backyard into a sports court, a new lounge space, and a luxurious, 3-season Mom's retreat.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Jenn and Josh don't have enough space in their semi-detached home to enjoy their hobbies. Brian and Sarah build a stylish lounge space and convert the existing garage into a multipurpose space for crafting and playing guitar.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.sub-title: A Space For Dancing and Hanging
programme.desc: Susan's energetic son, Harrison, has no space to dance at home without getting under his mom's feet. Brian and Sarah build a hang out / dance space for Harrison and create a California-inspired pool and lounge area for Susan.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Love is large but space is tight for Lara & Mike and their 5 children. Brian and Sarah free up space by building an activity-packed tree house and recreation court for the children, with grilling, dining and lounging areas for the whole family.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Brian and Sarah create a backyard for Pam & Kevin that matches their lush forest surrounding complete with a double wrap around deck and a hot tub. The team also build a workshop for Kevin to perfect his craft of leather tooling.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Couple Farzana & Reyan have maxed out all living space in their city-sized bungalow, leaving no room for Reyan's at-home stained glass business or Farzana's writing. Brian and Sarah build Reyan a spacious studio and construct an inspiring deck area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Breanna & Nick's life revolves around socializing and physical activity. Brian and Sarah convert an old, underused shed into a beautiful, zen'd out yoga studio and create backyard partying, lounging and dining areas.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sandra & David's eldest daughter, Harlow, was born with vision challenges and their youngest daughter, Delilah, is just learning to walk. Brian and Sarah build a colorful playland for both children, while also building a decked out BBQ & dining area.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: In South Devon, Joe and Claire's family house will be a giant sculpture inspired by the local landscape, 70 meters long and featuring 34 enormous angled zinc shards jutting out in all directions. But it proves astonishingly complicated to build.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Architectural designer Dan and interior designer Nina want to build a sleek, unique larch clad family house. But their biggest challenge is to convert a swamp on the plot into a sweeping, biodiverse waterscape with a beautiful natural swimming pond.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Young Cumbrian couple Rob and Ruth take on the ruins of a 200-year-old former Blacking Mill, their bold vision to conserve as much of the original structure as possible and within the walls slot in an entirely new sharp edged, modern building.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Bereaved Gretta returns from Malaysia to build a single-story, burnt wood and glass pavilion on the land of her sister Mary and brother-in-law Fernando. Also designed by her nephew Carlos, it's a real family affair, a story of recovery and renewal.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Carpenter Olaf creates an oasis for himself and partner Fritha on a small slice of land in West Sussex, squeezed by a mainline railway and a busy road. All they're left with is a very small triangle on which to build their future life together.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to East Sussex where concrete fanatic Adrian and wife Megan's cutting-edge concrete bunker is now complete. Is this raw, exposed concrete home really the ultimate 21st century country house?

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Steve Langstone and his wife Sharon found their perfect plot in some ancient woodland on the side of a lake, where they wanted to construct a home. They found an innovative company that specializes in constructing homes that are technically moveable.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: The Lambert family have spent the last 9 years searching for a home to call their own. To make building their new home affordable, the family discover a futuristic kit house company in Poland.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: After years traveling through Europe, Iain and Alyson are ready to put down roots. Their search takes them to Inner Hebridean Island of Skye where they purchase a remote half acre plot, but building a traditional house is a challenge.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Delaval and Veronica are restoring 450 acres for conservation and funding it by building a treehouse in Swanton Novers Wood. A Scottish firm constructs it in 7 sections to minimize damage to the woodland habitat on delivery.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Jamie Feilden's 60-acre farm doubles as a charity for urban youth. To fund it, he now plans two prefabricated elliptical cabins on a remote slope. They'll feature timber decks, open-plan living, and green roofs—though weather may delay the build.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: After years traveling through Europe, Iain and Alyson are ready to put down roots. Their search takes them to Inner Hebridean Island of Skye where they purchase a remote half acre plot, but building a traditional house is a challenge.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: TV Chef Andi Oliver takes Fred to Marrakech to enjoy lamb and couscous at legendary restaurant, chicken tagine for under £10, and breakfast on a roof terrace.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mamma Mia! Off We Go Again
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Go Greek! Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: On a mission to taste the worlds best breakfast, the three big egos Gordon, Gino and Fred are venturing out of their comfort zones crossing over the USA boarder into Mexico. They hope to stay out of trouble as they drive their bad boy transporter.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chef Nadiya Hussain shows Fred the culinary sights of Yorkshire including Bettys' iconic tea and cakes, a rural Wensleydale cheese farm and shop, and a small restaurant which serves home made samosas, Nadiya's favourite spicy Indian snack.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Food writer Rachel Khoo takes Fred to Vienna to experience exquisite coffee and cake, comforting dumplings, and mangalitza pork schnitzel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mamma Mia! Off We Go Again
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Go Greek! Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: On a mission to taste the worlds best breakfast, the three big egos Gordon, Gino and Fred are venturing out of their comfort zones crossing over the USA boarder into Mexico. They hope to stay out of trouble as they drive their bad boy transporter.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to head to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love. Gordon tries to embrace the flower power mood, but he's more interested in the 61 Michelin Stars. The boys travel to a Napa Valley vineyard in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: After four weeks on the road Gino's airing his feet in the back seat as the guys cruise along a Texan highway. Texas is a meat lovers paradise and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: Vietnam - a country known for its tropical landscapes, exotic Asian cuisine, and vibrant culture is enjoying a new surge in popularity as a go-to travel destination. And at the forefront of this booming tourism scene are two incredible hotels!

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels

programme.title: Storytellers

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.sub-title: Full Vintage Van Tour - Inside This Photographer's Ultimate Camper Van

programme.title: Huckberry Homes

programme.title: Into the Blue

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger break in Plantation Boat Mart's new 36' Invincible with some muttons for dinner and a shallow-water sailfish double.

programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his journey through Mexico in pursuit of the elusive Mexican Texanus Whitetail. With cooler temperatures setting in and buck activity on the rise, conditions are lining up for an action-packed evening in the field.

programme.desc: Host and real estate agent, Slade Priest, educates on everything from purchasing and flipping hunting properties, to improving existing ones.

programme.title: Pure Hunting Short Films

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh

programme.sub-title: Kansas Buck Appears Out of Nowhere
programme.desc: WoodHaven's Josh Anderson heads to the Western Plains of Kansas in pursuit of a mature whitetail buck. Because of the wide open terrain, a decoy and blind calling can be very affective because of the visibility.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Mike is hunting public land in Alabama and has birds gobbling first thing. Listening and watching how this gobbler responds to calling and interacts with the hens with him, Mike relies on good ol experience to know how to setup to kill this beard.

programme.title: The Bearded Buck

programme.title: Hard Truths Of Conservation

programme.title: Just Shot: Realtree Black Cloud
programme.desc: Rusty Creasey shares tips and tricks for calling ducks during the opening hunt of the second split of the Arkansas duck season.

programme.desc: Phillip Culpepper turkey hunts Wisconsin for late-season gobblers with "United Country's" Travis Hamele; they have an incredible hunt, and turkeys fall from the skies.

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
